videos.title: Viewport Meta Tag Explained
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains what the viewport meta tag does and why it's essential for responsive design.

videos.title: Responsive Design - Viewport Meta Tag
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers the viewport meta tag in the context of responsive web design fundamentals.

videos.title: The Viewport Meta Tag - What It Is and How to Use It
videos.description: Kyle explains the viewport meta tag, the visual viewport vs layout viewport, and practical implementation.

videos.title: CSS dvh, svh, lvh Units Explained
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains dynamic viewport units (dvh, svh, lvh) and when to use each one.

videos.title: Safe Areas for Notched Devices in CSS
videos.description: How to handle notched devices using viewport-fit=cover and env(safe-area-inset-*) CSS environment variables.
